games.explanation: The market has MIN as a +141 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Simeon Woods Richardson keeps MIN competitive on the mound against Kris Bubic. The sim projects MIN to plate 5.2 runs — expect some fireworks.

The market has WSN as a +152 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Foster Griffin keeps WSN competitive on the mound against Taijuan Walker. The sim projects WSN to plate 5.0 runs — expect some fireworks.
MIA is the better team by Elo and the sim confirms it — the market isn't giving them enough credit. Chris Paddack toes the rubber against Davis Martin. MIA holds a commanding 202-point Elo edge.
STL is getting plus-money at +130 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Kyle Leahy keeps STL competitive on the mound against Clay Holmes. Wind blowing in — pitchers' day.
